queries.question: List the cities with airports ordered by the number of runways alongside the runway details for each.
queries.sql: select cities.name, Airports.RunwayCount from Airports JOIN Cities ON Cities.Id = Airports.Id order by RunwayCount
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?runwaycount WHERE {
  ?airports a :Airports .
  ?cities a :Cities .
  ?cities p:Id ?id_l .
  ?airports p:Id ?id_r .
  ?cities p:name ?name .
  ?airports p:RunwayCount ?runwaycount .
  ?airports p:RunwayCount ?runwaycount_o .
  FILTER(STR(?id_l) = STR(?id_r))
}
ORDER BY ASC(?runwaycount_o)

queries.question: Display a list of the delayed flights and what airport city they are in
queries.sql: select cities.name, flights.FlightId from Airports JOIN flights ON flights.DepartureAirportId = airports.Id JOIN Cities ON Cities.Id = Airports.Id where status = 'Delayed'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?flightid WHERE {
  ?airports a :Airports .
  ?flights a :Flights .
  ?flights p:hasAirports_DepartureAirportId ?airports .
  ?cities a :Cities .
  ?cities p:Id ?id_l .
  ?airports p:Id ?id_r .
  ?cities p:name ?name .
  ?flights p:FlightId ?flightid .
  ?flights p:Status ?status_f .
  FILTER(STR(?id_l) = STR(?id_r))
  FILTER(STR(?status_f) = "Delayed")
}

queries.question: Display a list of the delayed flights and what airport code they are in
queries.sql: select Airports.Code, flights.FlightId from Airports JOIN flights ON flights.DepartureAirportId = airports.Id JOIN Cities ON Cities.Id = Airports.Id where status = 'Delayed'

  ?cities a :Cities .
  ?cities p:Id ?id_l .
  ?airports p:Id ?id_r .
  ?airports p:Code ?code .
  ?flights p:FlightId ?flightid .
  ?flights p:Status ?status_f .
  FILTER(STR(?id_l) = STR(?id_r))
  FILTER(STR(?status_f) = "Delayed")

queries.question: Show the airport codes and runway information all ordered by the number of runways.
queries.sql: select Airports.Code, Airports.RunwayCount from Airports JOIN Cities ON Cities.Id = Airports.Id order by RunwayCount
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?code ?runwaycount WHERE {
  ?airports a :Airports .
  ?cities a :Cities .
  ?cities p:Id ?id_l .
  ?airports p:Id ?id_r .
  ?airports p:Code ?code .
  ?airports p:RunwayCount ?runwaycount .
  ?airports p:RunwayCount ?runwaycount_o .
  FILTER(STR(?id_l) = STR(?id_r))
}
ORDER BY ASC(?runwaycount_o)

queries.question: Show the airports by city and code, including the runway data, ordered by the amount of runways.
queries.sql: select cities.name, Airports.Code, Airports.RunwayCount from Airports JOIN Cities ON Cities.Id = Airports.Id order by RunwayCount
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?code ?runwaycount WHERE {
  ?airports a :Airports .
  ?cities a :Cities .
  ?cities p:Id ?id_l .
  ?airports p:Id ?id_r .
  ?cities p:name ?name .
  ?airports p:Code ?code .
  ?airports p:RunwayCount ?runwaycount .
  ?airports p:RunwayCount ?runwaycount_o .
  FILTER(STR(?id_l) = STR(?id_r))
}
ORDER BY ASC(?runwaycount_o)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Display the airports and their runways in order of the number of runways they have
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?name ?runwaycount WHERE {
  ?airports a :Airports .
  ?cities a :Cities .
  ?cities p:Id ?id_l .
  ?airports p:Id ?id_r .
  ?cities p:name ?name .
  ?airports p:RunwayCount ?runwaycount .
  ?airports p:RunwayCount ?runwaycount_o .
  FILTER(STR(?id_l) = STR(?id_r))
}
ORDER BY ASC(?runwaycount_o) }
  component_2: { SELECT ?code ?runwaycount WHERE {
  ?airports a :Airports .
  ?cities a :Cities .
  ?cities p:Id ?id_l .
  ?airports p:Id ?id_r .
  ?airports p:Code ?code .
  ?airports p:RunwayCount ?runwaycount .
  ?airports p:RunwayCount ?runwaycount_o .
  FILTER(STR(?id_l) = STR(?id_r))
}
ORDER BY ASC(?runwaycount_o) }
  full: { SELECT ?name ?code ?runwaycount WHERE {
  ?airports a :Airports .
  ?cities a :Cities .
  ?cities p:Id ?id_l .
  ?airports p:Id ?id_r .
  ?cities p:name ?name .
  ?airports p:Code ?code .
  ?airports p:RunwayCount ?runwaycount .
  ?airports p:RunwayCount ?runwaycount_o .
  FILTER(STR(?id_l) = STR(?id_r))
}
ORDER BY ASC(?runwaycount_o) }
}

  ?cities a :Cities .
